positive: Intricate mystical floral pattern featuring stylized bioluminescent flora, crescent moons, and swirling celestial patterns, arranged in a balanced, repeating symmetrical border design. The style is a high-contrast, neo-blackwork tattoo illustration combined with elegant linocut print aesthetics. The color palette should be restricted to deep indigo, emerald green, and crisp white/off-white ink on a solid background. Focus on clean silhouettes, strong graphic contrast, and delicate filigree work suitable for textile printing. Central composition, high detail, award-winning print artwork.
negative: blur, low resolution, noise, text, watermark, signature, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy composition, photorealism, sketch, grayscale only
